source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-07..07-13, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + sessions, last 90d, by country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Tuesday 2026-07-14). No pause/promote verdicts today — decision review: Mondays. This week's read holds steady: EN A/B still effectively even (by page A 1.08% / 15 txn vs B 1.02% / 14 txn; by ad-content lp_a 0.95% / 19 txn vs lp_b 0.92% / 18 txn), gap well inside noise, neither near the ~100 conv/variant threshold. Localized IT/FR/DE conv still reads low in GA (attribution artifact) while Shopify shows real EU revenue. NOTE: the 16,000->18,000 copies-sold update + USD price clarity went LIVE on all LPs today (verified). Next verdict + significance recompute: Monday 2026-07-20.

experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

Confirms the near-0% localized LP conv in GA is a MEASUREMENT artifact (lossy LP->checkout attribution), not a funnel failure.
